5.3.3.4 GetGeluMaxMinTmpSize
Function Usage
To perform Gelu, FasterGelu, and FasterGeluV2 computations on the kernel,
developers need to reserve or allocate the temporary space. This API is used to
obtain the maximum and minimum sizes of the temporary space to be reserved or
allocated on the host. Developers can select a proper size within this range as the
tiling parameter and pass it to the kernel.
